UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2017, NOTICE OF HEARING OF DEFAULT PROVE UP - GRANTED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MITCH L. LYON, CSR #6840. TELEPHONE: 415-551-3703. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (514).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN & BRENDA KNUTSON A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP KNUTSON, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL KNUTSON, BRENDA AN INDIVIDUAL $60,845.65 PRINCIPAL, $5,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $999.34 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $66,844.99, SEE SCANNED DOC JUDGMENT OF POSSESSION FOR PLAINTIFF OF EQUIPMENT DESCRIBED IN EXHIBIT A. IF PLAINTIFF OBTAINS POSSESSION OF THE EQUIPMENT AND IT IS SOLD, DEFENDANTS SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT FOR THE NET SALES PROCEEDS.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Of Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Marc T. Cefalu, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No Appearance by defaulted defendants John & Brenda Knutson, a general partnership, John Knutson, an individual or Brenda Knutson, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants John & Brenda Knutson, a general partnership, John Knutson, an individual or Brenda Knutson, an individual, on August 23, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 23, 2017.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 13, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants John & Brenda Knutson, a general partnership, John Knutson, an individual or Brenda Knutson, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $60,845.65.
Attorney Fees - $5,000.00.
Costs - $999.34.75, for a total judgment in the amount of $66,844.99.

Additionally, plaintiff Bank of the West entitled to recover the equipment described in Exhibit A to the judgment as a "new 2012 Kawasaki 60ZV-2 Wheel Loader." If plaintiff obtains possession of the equipment and it is sold, defendants shall receive a credit for the net sales proceeds.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2017 Continued To Dec-27-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
